description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized white SUV with a sleek, aerodynamic body and black trim accents. The vehicle features a prominent front grille with a honeycomb pattern, flanked by slim, angular headlights and a sculpted hood. The side profile reveals four passenger doors, flush door handles, black side mirrors, and a roof rack for additional cargo capacity. The rear is characterized by wraparound taillights, a subtle roof spoiler, and dual exhaust outlets, giving it a sporty yet practical appearance. The wheels are white with a five-spoke design and red accents, adding a touch of style. The windows are tinted, and the overall build suggests a robust, urban-friendly vehicle suitable for families or groups.
description: A sleek white SUV with black trim, tinted windows, and distinctive five-spoke wheels with red accents. Features include a bold grille, roof rack, and sporty rear details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold black grille, angular headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, roof rack, and white five-spoke wheels with red accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wraparound taillights, roof spoiler, and dual exhaust outlets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, roof rack, and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke white rims with red accent details
